parts.purpose: Provides one persistent visible name for the enhanced trigger or native select.
Opens the enhanced non-editable single-selection popup and displays the selected text.
Positions the enhanced listbox without clipping and restores focus to the trigger on dismissal.
Hosts one single-selection instance of the shared collection model.
Exposes stable key, localized textValue, disabled state, typeahead, focus, and selection.
Provides the explicit platform-picker path for simple and mobile-first choices.
Provides explicit remote pagination in enhanced or native presentation.
